summary: Authors Learnosity-compatible assessment items from natural-language descriptions.
in_scope: Cloze (fill-in-the-blank) items with text, dropdown, association, or formula blanks
Choice matrix, ordering, and classification items
Token-highlight (hot text) items: highlight listed tokens within a passage
Math fill-in items with equivalence-based scoring
Custom items that embed interactive content authored in another Graffiticode dialect
Item-level metadata: tags, NGSS/CCSS/custom standards, DOK, difficulty
Question-level metadata: per-distractor rationale, notes, acknowledgements
Save-to-itembank for persistence vs. preview-only items
out_of_scope: Assessment items for any platform other than Learnosity (e.g. Kahoot, Quizizz, Google Forms, Edulastic, OpenAssessments, Canvas Quizzes, Moodle, plain HTML quiz pages) — L0176 emits Learnosity-shaped JSON only
Activity-level assembly (timed tests, sections, branching) — use Learnosity Activities API
Delivery configuration (proctoring, time limits, attempt caps, accommodations)
Learner-side analytics (responses, mastery, reporting) — Learnosity Data / Reports APIs
Host-app embedding (React mounts, Canvas LTI) — handled by the host runtime
Raw Learnosity JSON patches — describe items in natural language; emit JSON, don't author it by hand
